title: BEM-567 check Claude token
objective: Diagnose whether repository workflows already reference CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN or related Claude Code token secrets. Inspect .github/workflows/*.yml and governance docs for CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CLAUDE, OAUTH, token references. Do not print secret values. Write governance/reports/bem567_check_claude_code_token_secret.md with: references found, whether secret value can be verified from repo, exact operator steps needed in GitHub UI if missing, and no issue comments. Create proof. No issue comments.
